label: Space edge graphic data
description: Texture paths for the various edge graphic shapes used by space-edge terrain (Odyssey DLC).

OShapeTexPath.label: O-shape texture path
OShapeTexPath.description: Texture path for the closed-loop O-shape edge variant.

UShapeTexPath.label: U-shape texture path
UShapeTexPath.description: Texture path for the U-shape (three-sided open) edge variant.

CornerInnerTexPath.label: Corner inner texture path
CornerInnerTexPath.description: Texture path for the inner corner edge variant.

CornerOuterTexPath.label: Corner outer texture path
CornerOuterTexPath.description: Texture path for the outer corner edge variant.

FlatTexPath.label: Flat texture path
FlatTexPath.description: Texture path for the flat (straight edge) variant.

LoopLeftTexPath.label: Loop left texture path
LoopLeftTexPath.description: Texture path for the left-side loop end edge variant.

LoopRightTexPath.label: Loop right texture path
LoopRightTexPath.description: Texture path for the right-side loop end edge variant.

LoopSingleTexPath.label: Loop single texture path
LoopSingleTexPath.description: Texture path for the single-cell isolated loop edge variant.

LoopTexPaths.label: Loop texture paths
LoopTexPaths.description: List of texture paths for loop segment variants.

overrideColor.label: Override color
overrideColor.description: Optional tint color applied to all space-edge graphics. When absent the default white tint is used.
